description.en: OpenAI’s terminal-first coding agent for editing code, running commands, and agentic development loops.
description.zh-TW: OpenAI 的終端優先 coding agent，可編輯程式、執行指令並進行 agent 式開發迴圈。

permissionProfile.notes: Can read and modify local repositories and run commands.

strengths.en: Tight CLI loop for code-centric work.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合 code-centric 工作的 CLI 迴圈。

strengths.en: Natural fit for repo-based engineering tasks.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合 repo 型工程任務。

caveats.en: High local permissions need operator discipline.
caveats.zh-TW: 本地權限高，需要操作紀律。

caveats.en: Mostly optimized for developer workflows.
caveats.zh-TW: 主要仍偏向開發者工作流。

summary.en: OpenAI’s terminal-first coding agent for editing code, running commands, and agentic development loops.
summary.zh-TW: OpenAI 的終端優先 coding agent，可編輯程式、執行指令並進行 agent 式開發迴圈。

description.en: Anthropic’s terminal coding agent for repository work, refactors, debugging, and code generation.
description.zh-TW: Anthropic 的終端 coding agent，適合 repo 工作、重構、debug 與程式生成。

permissionProfile.notes: Can inspect and modify code and run commands locally.

strengths.en: Strong fit for code review and refactor-heavy sessions.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合 code review 與重構密集工作。

strengths.en: Part of Anthropic’s broader MCP-friendly ecosystem.
strengths.zh-TW: 屬於 Anthropic 更大的 MCP 友善生態。

caveats.en: Local command execution still needs careful controls.
caveats.zh-TW: 本地指令執行仍需要審慎控管。

caveats.en: Mostly centered on Anthropic-native workflows.
caveats.zh-TW: 主要仍以 Anthropic 原生工作流為中心。

summary.en: Anthropic’s terminal coding agent for repository work, refactors, debugging, and code generation.
summary.zh-TW: Anthropic 的終端 coding agent，適合 repo 工作、重構、debug 與程式生成。

description.en: A stateful graph orchestration framework for long-running agents and controllable multi-step workflows.
description.zh-TW: 用於長時間運行 agents 與可控多步驟流程的有狀態 graph 編排框架。

permissionProfile.notes: Framework-level; actual risk depends on attached tools.

strengths.en: Excellent for explicit, inspectable multi-step flows.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合需要明確、可檢查的多步驟流程。

strengths.en: Works well when teams want control rather than magic.
strengths.zh-TW: 適合想要控制權而不是黑盒魔法的團隊。

caveats.en: Adds orchestration complexity.
caveats.zh-TW: 會引入編排複雜度。

caveats.en: Overkill for simple single-call apps.
caveats.zh-TW: 對單次呼叫型 app 可能太重。

sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: A stateful graph orchestration framework for long-running agents and controllable multi-step workflows.
summary.zh-TW: 用於長時間運行 agents 與可控多步驟流程的有狀態 graph 編排框架。

description.en: A broad framework for building LLM apps, retrieval pipelines, and agent workflows across providers.
description.zh-TW: 用來打造 LLM app、檢索管線與跨供應商 agent workflow 的廣泛框架。

permissionProfile.notes: Risk depends on the tools and providers connected.

strengths.en: Very broad ecosystem coverage.
strengths.zh-TW: 生態覆蓋非常廣。

strengths.en: Good for teams that need provider abstraction.
strengths.zh-TW: 對需要供應商抽象層的團隊很有用。

caveats.en: The breadth can feel heavy for smaller apps.
caveats.zh-TW: 對小型 app 來說，廣度有時會顯得過重。

caveats.en: Abstractions can obscure provider-specific strengths.
caveats.zh-TW: 抽象層有時會遮蔽供應商原生優勢。

summary.en: A broad framework for building LLM apps, retrieval pipelines, and agent workflows across providers.
summary.zh-TW: 用來打造 LLM app、檢索管線與跨供應商 agent workflow 的廣泛框架。

description.en: OpenAI’s provider-native SDK for building agents with tools, handoffs, guardrails, and tracing.
description.zh-TW: OpenAI 原生的 agent SDK，可建立含工具、handoff、guardrail 與 tracing 的 agents。

permissionProfile.notes: SDK-level risk depends on attached tools and code execution choices.

strengths.en: Very aligned with OpenAI-native agent features.
strengths.zh-TW: 和 OpenAI 原生 agent 功能高度對齊。

strengths.en: Good choice when deep OpenAI integration matters more than neutrality.
strengths.zh-TW: 當深度整合 OpenAI 比中立性更重要時很適合。

caveats.en: Less provider-neutral than LangGraph or LangChain.
caveats.zh-TW: 不像 LangGraph / LangChain 那麼中立。

caveats.en: Best for teams already comfortable with OpenAI’s stack.
caveats.zh-TW: 最適合已熟悉 OpenAI stack 的團隊。

summary.en: OpenAI’s provider-native SDK for building agents with tools, handoffs, guardrails, and tracing.
summary.zh-TW: OpenAI 原生的 agent SDK，可建立含工具、handoff、guardrail 與 tracing 的 agents。

description.en: A workflow automation platform for triggers, integrations, and multi-step AI operations.
description.zh-TW: 可做觸發器、整合與多步驟 AI 營運流程的工作流自動化平台。

auth.notes: Depends on connected services and provider keys.

permissionProfile.notes: Workflow nodes can reach many external systems.

strengths.en: Practical for operational AI workflows that need triggers and approvals.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合需要觸發與審批的營運型 AI 工作流。

strengths.en: Flexible enough for mixed human-and-AI processes.
strengths.zh-TW: 對人機混合流程相當靈活。

caveats.en: Governance matters once workflows touch many systems.
caveats.zh-TW: 當 workflow 接到很多系統後，治理會變重要。

caveats.en: Can become spaghetti without workflow discipline.
caveats.zh-TW: 若缺少流程紀律，容易長成 spaghetti。

summary.en: A workflow automation platform for triggers, integrations, and multi-step AI operations.
summary.zh-TW: 可做觸發器、整合與多步驟 AI 營運流程的工作流自動化平台。

description.en: An integration and automation platform for event-driven workflows, APIs, and AI actions.
description.zh-TW: 用於事件驅動 workflow、API 與 AI actions 的整合自動化平台。

permissionProfile.notes: Hosted automation layer with access to connected services.

strengths.en: Good fit for hosted event-driven automations.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合託管型事件驅動自動化。

caveats.en: Hosted workflow centralization can raise governance questions.
caveats.zh-TW: 流程集中到 hosted 層後，治理問題會變得重要。

caveats.en: Less ideal for teams wanting maximum local control.
caveats.zh-TW: 不太適合要求高度本地控制的團隊。

summary.en: An integration and automation platform for event-driven workflows, APIs, and AI actions.
summary.zh-TW: 用於事件驅動 workflow、API 與 AI actions 的整合自動化平台。

description.en: A modern browser automation framework used for reliable UI scripting, testing, and web interactions.
description.zh-TW: 現代化瀏覽器自動化框架，適合穩定的 UI 腳本、測試與網頁互動。

permissionProfile.notes: Browser automation can access authenticated sessions and web content.

strengths.en: Very dependable browser automation baseline.
strengths.zh-TW: 瀏覽器自動化基線非常可靠。

strengths.en: Widely understood and well documented.
strengths.zh-TW: 普及度高、文件也成熟。

caveats.en: Running browsers at scale still adds operational overhead.
caveats.zh-TW: 大規模跑瀏覽器仍然有營運成本。

caveats.en: Not a hosted browser service on its own.
caveats.zh-TW: 本身不是 hosted browser 服務。

summary.en: A modern browser automation framework used for reliable UI scripting, testing, and web interactions.
summary.zh-TW: 現代化瀏覽器自動化框架，適合穩定的 UI 腳本、測試與網頁互動。

description.en: Hosted browser infrastructure for running browser automation and web agents in the cloud.
description.zh-TW: 託管式瀏覽器基礎設施，可在雲端執行瀏覽器自動化與 web agents。

permissionProfile.notes: Hosted browser sessions can access external websites and credentials.

strengths.en: Removes a lot of browser ops pain.
strengths.zh-TW: 能移除不少瀏覽器維運痛點。

strengths.en: Useful for teams moving browser automation into production.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合把瀏覽器自動化推進 production 的團隊。

caveats.en: Adds a vendor dependency for browser runtime.
caveats.zh-TW: 會增加瀏覽器 runtime 的供應商依賴。

caveats.en: Sensitive workflows still need session and secret hygiene.
caveats.zh-TW: 敏感流程仍要注意 session 與 secret 管理。

summary.zh-TW: 託管式瀏覽器基礎設施，可在雲端執行瀏覽器自動化與 web agents。

description.en: A web crawling and extraction layer designed to turn sites into clean content for AI pipelines.
description.zh-TW: 專為 AI pipeline 把網站轉成乾淨內容的 web crawling 與 extraction 層。

permissionProfile.notes: Interacts with third-party websites and external content.

strengths.en: Great fit for content ingestion and RAG prep.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合內容擷取與 RAG 前處理。

strengths.en: Canonical crawling API helps reduce custom scraper work.
strengths.zh-TW: 統一的 crawling API 可以減少客製 scraper 工作。

caveats.en: Website variability always creates some extraction edge cases.
caveats.zh-TW: 網站差異永遠會帶來一些擷取 edge case。

caveats.en: Still needs legal and rate-limit awareness.
caveats.zh-TW: 仍要注意法務與 rate limit。

summary.en: A web crawling and extraction layer designed to turn sites into clean content for AI pipelines.

description.en: A search API built for LLMs and agents that need live web results and research context.
description.zh-TW: 為 LLM 與 agents 設計的搜尋 API，可提供即時網頁結果與研究上下文。

strengths.en: Simple way to add live web context to agents.
strengths.zh-TW: 能很簡單地替 agent 加上即時網頁上下文。

strengths.en: Designed for LLM consumption rather than raw search UI.
strengths.zh-TW: 設計重點是給 LLM 消費，而不是傳統搜尋 UI。

caveats.en: Search quality still depends on query strategy.
caveats.zh-TW: 搜尋品質仍取決於 query 策略。

caveats.en: Not a full crawling or browser stack.
caveats.zh-TW: 不是完整 crawling 或 browser stack。

summary.en: A search API built for LLMs and agents that need live web results and research context.

description.en: A search and web data API for retrieval, company research, and agent discovery tasks.

strengths.en: Strong fit for structured research and company discovery.

strengths.en: Useful when search needs to feed downstream systems, not just chat.
strengths.zh-TW: 當搜尋結果要餵給下游系統，而不只是聊天時會很好用。

caveats.en: Narrower than full browser automation.
caveats.zh-TW: 範圍比完整瀏覽器自動化更窄。

caveats.en: Teams still need their own ranking and evaluation logic.
caveats.zh-TW: 團隊仍需自建排序與評估邏輯。

description.en: An API layer for search engine result pages across major engines and verticals.

caveats.en: Less opinionated for LLM-native workflows than some newer APIs.

caveats.en: Often needs extra post-processing before model use.

summary.en: An API layer for search engine result pages across major engines and verticals.

description.en: OpenAI’s open-source speech recognition model and CLI for local transcription.
description.zh-TW: OpenAI 開源的語音辨識模型與 CLI，可做本地轉錄。

strengths.en: Local transcription avoids sending audio to an API.

description.en: A secrets-management CLI for injecting, reading, and operating on credentials in workflows.
description.zh-TW: 可在工作流中注入、讀取與操作憑證的 secrets-management CLI。

permissionProfile.notes: Touches sensitive credentials and secret material.

strengths.en: Strong fit for practical secret hygiene.

caveats.en: Secrets tooling deserves extra operational review.

caveats.en: Account setup and session handling add onboarding steps.

description.en: A vector database and knowledge layer for retrieval, semantic search, and memory-heavy AI systems.
description.zh-TW: 用於檢索、語義搜尋與記憶密集 AI 系統的向量資料庫與知識層。

permissionProfile.notes: Stores knowledge and embeddings that may be sensitive.

strengths.en: Good fit for structured knowledge layers.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合作為結構化知識層。

strengths.en: Supports more serious retrieval architectures than a quick demo stack.
strengths.zh-TW: 比起 demo stack，更能支撐正式的檢索架構。

caveats.en: Database operations add maintenance burden.
caveats.zh-TW: 資料庫維運會增加負擔。

caveats.en: Not necessary for every small assistant.
caveats.zh-TW: 不是每個小型助理都需要。

summary.en: A vector database and knowledge layer for retrieval, semantic search, and memory-heavy AI systems.
summary.zh-TW: 用於檢索、語義搜尋與記憶密集 AI 系統的向量資料庫與知識層。

description.en: A memory layer for capturing, storing, and retrieving useful user or agent context over time.
description.zh-TW: 用來長期捕捉、儲存與取回使用者或 agent 上下文的記憶層。

auth.notes: Depends on deployment and storage backend.

permissionProfile.notes: Memory systems can accumulate sensitive long-lived context.

strengths.en: Explicit memory layer helps move beyond stateless chat.
strengths.zh-TW: 明確的記憶層有助於走出 stateless chat。

strengths.en: Useful for personalization and continuity.
strengths.zh-TW: 對個人化與連續性很有幫助。

caveats.en: Memory quality and privacy policy matter as much as tooling.
caveats.zh-TW: 記憶品質與隱私政策和工具本身一樣重要。

caveats.en: Poor memory hygiene can become a trust problem quickly.
caveats.zh-TW: 記憶 hygiene 不好，很快就會變成信任問題。

description.en: An official GitHub MCP server for repository, issue, PR, and code-context operations.

description.en: Supabase’s MCP integration layer for connecting agents to database-backed product context.

permissionProfile.notes: Database-connected tools need careful read/write scoping.

caveats.en: Needs strong governance before exposing production data.

sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: A hosted execution sandbox for giving agents safer code-running environments.
summary.zh-TW: 給 agents 使用、較安全的託管程式執行沙盒。

description.en: Zapier’s action layer for letting AI systems trigger business tools and SaaS workflows.
description.zh-TW: 讓 AI 系統觸發商務工具與 SaaS workflow 的 Zapier action 層。

permissionProfile.notes: Can act across many connected business apps.

strengths.en: Huge app ecosystem makes it very practical.
strengths.zh-TW: 龐大 app 生態讓它很實用。

strengths.en: Useful bridge from AI assistants into business systems.
strengths.zh-TW: 能把 AI 助理順利接進商務系統。

caveats.en: Action sprawl can become hard to govern.
caveats.zh-TW: action 過多時不容易治理。

caveats.en: Hosted middleware may not fit every security posture.
caveats.zh-TW: 託管中介層未必符合所有安全姿態。
